notes: Initial project skill for annotating existing DG drafts with platform question types and concise reasoning.
Uses the confirmed platform type mapping from final_dg_all.json and user/backend clarification.
Does not produce backend import JSON or change the questionnaire structure.
0.1.1 changes user-facing labels to 简答、单选、多选、打分、排序、AI-bot、开场白、结束画面、中场休息; final wording output shows only labels such as 【单选】, while designer/review output may include reasons.
0.1.2 clarifies that platform score questions only support 1-10 ratings; do not generate or label 1-5 ratings as 打分.
0.1.3 adds choice-question logic: use 单选/多选 sparingly and normally only when selections drive branching, jump logic, display logic, selected-option follow-up, or segmentation; otherwise prefer 简答.
0.1.4 adds module type labeling as 访谈题 or 打卡题, preserves repeated check-in event/frequency/unit fields, and appends 必填图片 / 必填视频 markers to question type labels when media upload is mandatory.
